title: mentha × schultziana var. wohlwerthiana
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. wohlwerthiana, also known as Bergamot mint, is a hybrid of the peppermint and spearmint species, characterized by its distinctive orange-brown stems and purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Its health benefits include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve oral health. Traditionally, Bergamot mint is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
